privileged_info_summary: I verified that the minimum Wazuh rule level to obtain the bonus is 13, the required output report path is /home/ga/Desktop/incident_report.txt, and the minimum required report length is 300 characters, all of which directly match the verifier logic. The authentication events are synthetically generated dynamically via setup_task.sh injecting failed SSH and sudo attempts, although they are recorded as actual OS events.
